title: nepeta decolorans
intro: Nepeta decolorans, also known as White Mint, is a perennial plant species in the mint family. It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and the Middle East. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Nepeta decolorans include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as digestive issues like indigestion and nausea. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to alleviate these conditions.
